title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Hilton India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at Hilton India
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Hilton India! We are hiring a Hotel Manager for our Nashik team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Hilton India:
Hilton India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Barista Skills
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hilton India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
